name: specificlanguage/Starbot
description: Prototype discord bot that tracks star reactions, akin to pins, but then reposts message on another channel, and tracks the star count for popularity among users. Allows multiple "starboards", and unlike many others, allows for multiple starboards to be on one discord. Currently still testing! Please raise issues as needed.

name: mayurgpt07/WheatClassification
description: (PyTorch Image Reader) Wheat is a staple across the globe, which is why this competition must account for different growing conditions. Models developed for wheat phenotyping need to be able to generalize between environments. If successful, researchers can accurately estimate the density and size of wheat heads in different varieties. With improved detection farmers can better assess their crops, ultimately bringing cereal, toast, and other favorite dishes to your table.
